name: linSendVariableBitStream
title: linSendVariableBitStream
syntax: long linSendVariableBitStream(byte dataBuffer[], int64 lengthInNS[], dword numberOfBits, dword roundUp); // form 1
long linSendVariableBitStream(byte dataBuffer[], int64 lengthInNS[], dword numberOfBits, dword roundUp, dword timeoutPrevention) // form 2
description: Sends an arbitrary bit stream with bits of variable length on the LIN bus.

parameters.name: dataBuffer
parameters.description: The bit stream to be sent. Maximum number of bits: 2^31-1.

parameters.name: lengthInNS
parameters.description: The length of each bit in nanoseconds.

parameters.name: numberOfBits
parameters.description: The number of bits in the bitStream-array. Note that while the dataBuffer-array will usually have a size of ceil(numberOfBits / 8), the size of lengthInNS will need to be at least numberOfBits

parameters.name: roundUp
parameters.description: If true, the lengths specified in lengthInNS will be rounded up to the next possible length that can be transmitted by the LIN hardware, otherwise the lengths will be rounded down.

parameters.name: timeoutPrevention
parameters.description: 0: deactivates the timeout prevention for the 7259-transceiver. 1: activates the timeout prevention for the 7259-transceiver.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
